supporterStore.title: Supporter's Club
supporterStore.subtitle: Optional convenience perks — thank you for supporting the game!
supporterStore.qolNotice: QoL only: no combat stats, no Arena point changes. Persists across prestige.
supporterStore.thankYou: Thank you for supporting the game! "{item}" is now active.

autoShopAssistant.label: Auto-Shop Assistant
autoShopAssistant.effect: Automatically buys the best ROI upgrade when you enter prep

advancedCombatLog.label: Advanced Combat Log
advancedCombatLog.effect: Extra analytics on the wave outcome screen

arenaLoadout.title: Arena Tactical Loadout
arenaLoadout.subtitle: Deploy your roster on ranks 1–2. Point costs use live upgrade levels.
arenaLoadout.rosterHint: Deploy onto cyan squares (ranks 1–2) or use Auto-place.
arenaLoadout.saveInvalid: Cannot save — add a King and stay within the cap.
arenaLoadout.boardIdle: Select a roster piece, then tap a highlighted square.
arenaLoadout.boardDeploy: Tap a cyan square on ranks 1–2 to place the piece.

chessDojo.title: Chess Dojo
chessDojo.subtitle: Training room — sharpen tactics and earn Skill Points.
chessDojo.shopHint: Spend Skill Points on permanent Dojo bonuses. Affordable upgrades are highlighted.
chessDojo.yourTurn: Your turn — tap a piece, then a highlighted square.
chessDojo.stalemate: Draw — no legal moves. Reset to continue.
chessDojo.modulesHint: Win a match while a module is selected to unlock +15% AP vs that wave pattern.

deepThought.label: Deep Thought
deepThought.effect: +1 Hard AI search ply per rank

openingRepertoire.label: Opening Repertoire
openingRepertoire.effect: +10% Skill Points from Easy wins per rank

endgamePrecision.label: Endgame Precision
endgamePrecision.effect: +10% Skill Points from Medium wins per rank

chessTown.title: Chess Town
chessTown.subtitle: Permanent base — upgrade buildings for account-wide bonuses.
chessTown.persistNotice: Town levels persist across prestige resets.

chessBoard.title: Chessboard
chessBoard.prepReposition: Tap a violet square to reposition
chessBoard.prepFormation: Tap your pieces to set formation (ranks 1–2)
chessBoard.strikeArmedStamina: Strike armed — tap an enemy ({current}/{max} stamina)
chessBoard.noLegalMoves: No legal moves — use Skip Turn below
chessBoard.moveArmed: Move armed — tap a sky square or enemy you can capture
chessBoard.yourTurnDual: Your turn — use Move to play a piece, or Strike to chip enemies
chessBoard.strikeBetweenTurns: Strike armed — tap enemies between turns
chessBoard.autoStrikeHint: Auto moves pieces — Strike armed for tap damage

onboarding.title: Read the threat
onboarding.body: The enemy Rook is about to strike! Block it with your Pawn to earn a Tempo Bonus.
onboarding.intentHint: Watch the Intent Ribbon — telegraphed enemies are highlighted in red.
onboarding.actionHint: Arm Move, then tap your Pawn onto the square that interrupts the Rook.
onboarding.armedHint: Move armed — tap the highlighted square with your Pawn (●) to block the Rook.

intentRibbon.title: Threat timeline
intentRibbon.tempoHint: Manual capture or chip on a telegraphed enemy before it acts → Tempo Bonus (−5% next move delay).

devMode.title: Dev mode
devMode.hint: Ctrl+Shift+D to toggle. Cheats affect this save only.
devMode.prodWarning: Production build — use a test save.
devMode.godModeOn: On — you one-shot enemies; enemies cannot hurt you
